name: Master Flank Steak A-1 Directions and Ideas for Leftovers
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Napa Cabbage Slaw by finely chopping or shredding cabbage.
2. Grill the flank steak to desired doneness and slice into strips.
3. For a soup, simmer ½ cup of slaw in vegetable broth or chicken stock per serving.
4. Add slaw, grilled steak (¼ cup per serving), and noodles during last 5 minutes of cooking.
5. Season soup with barbecue sauce.
6. Assemble pita sandwiches by combining slaw and steak; season with barbecue sauce.
7. Heat the mixture in a microwave or on the stove.
8. Fill warmed pita halves with the mixture, add hot sauce, cucumbers, and tomatoes.
9. Roll up and enjoy.
10. Alternatively, assemble rice paper rolls following steps 6-8.
11. Serve leftover steak with reheated slaw over romaine lettuce and fresh fruit (mango, orange, grapefruit).
12. Moisturize the salad with a zesty vinaigrette flavored slightly with remaining barbecue sauce.
